records.code: * 3.B) ISS selects companies from the comparison universe that are
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：3.B) ISS selects companies from the comparison universe that are

records.code: *   - in the subject company's 6-digit GICS category,
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：- in the subject company's 6-digit GICS category,

records.code: *   - first selecting the companies closest in size, while where possible alternating between companies larger and
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：- first selecting the companies closest in size, while where possible alternating between companies larger and

records.code: *     smaller than the subject company so as to maintain the subject at or near the median of the chosen comparison group.
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：smaller than the subject company so as to maintain the subject at or near the median of the chosen comparison group.

records.code: *   - If the comparison group reaches the minimum 14 members, it is considered complete;
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：- If the comparison group reaches the minimum 14 members, it is considered complete;

records.code: *     up to 24 comparison companies can be selected from the 6-digit GICS category.
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：up to 24 comparison companies can be selected from the 6-digit GICS category.

records.code: *  => if not 24 companies yet, then repeat with GICS4, then GICS2, until at least 14 companies found.
records.section: Step (3) now narrow down the field of potential peers by ISS's methodology
records.explanation: 代码注释：=> if not 24 companies yet, then repeat with GICS4, then GICS2, until at least 14 companies found.
